fields.name: Table Name
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the name of the table with the warehouse activity that the comment applies to.

Additional Information

The following tables are supported:
Warehouse Activity Header

Warehouse Receipt Header

Warehouse Shipment Header

Whse. Internal Put-away Header

Whse. Internal Pick Header

Registered Whse. Activity Hdr.

Posted Whse. Receipt Header

Posted Whse. Shipment Header

Posted Invt. Put-away Header

Posted Invt. Pick Header

Registered Invt. Movement Hdr.

Internal Movement Header

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of warehouse activity that the comment applies to.
The type is copied from the warehouse activity header.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number for the comment.
When you create a comment for a warehouse document, a line number that is specific to the particular comment in the Line No. field is automatically entered.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the comment was created.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the comment.
